revision.comment: Refine category
revision.text:
This [[Wikipedia:Category|category]] is for [[Wikipedia:Article|articles]] on [[history]] [[books]] [[Publishing|published]] in the [[17th century]]. {{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:17th-century non-fiction books|History]] [[Category:History books by century]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=17th-century_history_books here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
